title: String Concatenation
description: This code builds a string with repeated push_str/format! calls. Refactor to be more efficient and readable.
hints: The join() method on slices can combine strings with a separator
format! macro can combine it all in one expression
scoringCriteria: Uses join() or itertools intersperse. Uses format! macro. Uses &[String] instead of &Vec<String>. Single expression if possible.
